broomstick-tagline: Main heading on the landing page, describes the purpose of the tool
broomstick-subtitle: Subtitle text that appears below the main heading, containing brief description about how to use Broomstick
logo-alt: Alt text for the Broomstick logo image
search-button: Label for the button that executes the search
search-heading: Heading for the search panel section
search-language-label: Label displayed before the Lexeme language selection combobox.
search-query-label: Label displayed before the query type combobox. The combobox options are self-contained noun phrases (e.g. 'Empty Lexemes'). This label does not need to form a grammatical sentence with the selected option.
search-language-placeholder: Placeholder text shown in the language dropdown before selection
search-query-placeholder: Placeholder text shown in the query dropdown before selection
search-show-panel: Button text to expand/show the collapsed search panel
search-show-panel-aria-with-filters: Aria label for button to show search and filter panel with active filter count. $1 = number of active filters. Translator MUST use {{PLURAL}}.
search-show-panel-aria: Aria label for button to show the search and filter panel
search-hide-panel-aria: Aria label for button to collapse/hide the search panel
search-form-filter-clear-notice: Notice message shown when user changes language or gap type after results exist, warning that filters will be cleared
results-querying: Heading text shown while the query is in progress
results-querying-aria: Aria label for the progress bar while querying Wikidata
errors-language-not-found: Error message shown when user enters an invalid language
errors-query-not-found: Error message shown when user enters an invalid query type
errors-query-failed: Error message shown when the Wikidata query fails
errors-lexical-category-not-found: Error message shown when user enters invalid lexical category in filter
errors-unable-to-connect: Error message shown when unable to connect to Wikidata
errors-reload-prompt: Suggestion to reload the page when connection fails
errors-reload-page: Button text to reload the page
table-visited-header: Aria label for the visited status column header in results table
table-visited-yes: Aria label for icon indicating a Lexeme has been visited
table-visited-no: Aria label for icon indicating a Lexeme has not been visited
table-result-count: Caption showing number of results. $1 = number of results. Translator MUST use {{PLURAL}}.
table-lexeme-id-header: Column header for Lexeme ID (LID) in results table
table-lemma-header: Column header for Lemma in results table
table-category-header: Column header for lexical category (noun, verb, etc.) in results table
table-all-visited: Message shown when all Lexemes in results have been marked as visited
table-no-results: Message shown when query returns no results
table-try-query: Suggestion message shown when no results found, instructing user to clear filters or try different search parameters
table-hide-visited: Button text to toggle on/off to hide Lexemes that have been visited
table-hide-visited-aria: Aria label for button text to toggle on/off to hide Lexemes that have been visited
table-hidden-count: Text showing how many visited Lexemes are currently hidden from the table. $1 = number of hidden Lexemes. Translator MUST use {{PLURAL}}.
table-visibility-none-hidden: Message shown in visibility toggle when no visited Lexemes are currently hidden
table-visibility-hidden-announce: Screen reader announcement when visited Lexemes are hidden from the table. $1 = number of hidden Lexemes. Translator MUST use {{PLURAL}}.
table-header-lid-default: Aria label for LID column header in default sort state
table-header-lid-ascending: Aria label for LID column header when sorted ascending
table-header-lid-descending: Aria label for LID column header when sorted descending
table-header-lemma-default: Aria label for Lemma column header in default sort state
table-header-lemma-ascending: Aria label for Lemma column header when sorted ascending
table-header-lemma-descending: Aria label for Lemma column header when sorted descending
table-header-lexcat-default: Aria label for Lexical category column header in default sort state
table-header-lexcat-ascending: Aria label for Lexical category column header when sorted ascending
table-header-lexcat-descending: Aria label for Lexical category column header when sorted descending
cdx-table-pagination-status-message-dete: Short pagination status showing current row range and total. $1 = first row number in current page, $2 = last row number in current page, $3 = total number of rows.
Long pagination status showing current row range and total. $1 = first row number in current page, $2 = last row number in current page, $3 = total number of rows.
cdx-table-pager-items-per-page-current: Shows the number of rows per page currently selected by the user. $1 = number of rows. Translator MUST use {{PLURAL}}.
cdx-table-pager-button-first-page: Aria label to table first page
cdx-table-pager-button-last-page: Aria label to table last page
cdx-table-pager-button-next-page: Aria label to table next page
cdx-table-pager-button-prev-page: Aria label to table previous page
cdx-dialog-close-button-label: Aria label for the close button in Codex dialogs
state-on: Label for on state of a toggle
state-off: Label for off state of a toggle
footer-by: Preposition before Wikicollabs link, as in 'created by Wikicollabs'
footer-powered-by: Text crediting Wikidata as data source
footer-source: Link text to source code repository
footer-wikicollabs-aria: Aria label for Wikicollabs footer link, opens in new tab
footer-about-aria: Aria label for About page footer link, opens in new tab
footer-privacy-policy-aria: Aria label for Privacy Policy footer link, opens in new tab
footer-license-aria: Aria label for License footer link, opens in new tab
footer-source-code-aria: Aria label for Source Code footer link, opens in new tab
settings-menu-label-aria: Aria label for the settings menu button
settings-theme-label: Label for theme selection option in settings
settings-theme-auto: Option to automatically detect theme based on system preference
settings-theme-auto-description: Description text explaining the automatic theme option
settings-language-label: Label for display language selection in settings
settings-language-search-placeholder: Placeholder text inside the language search input field in the settings menu.
settings-language-no-results: Message shown when no languages match the user's search input.
settings-language-no-results-suggestion: Follow-up hint shown below the 'no results' message, suggesting the user try different search terms.
settings-language-changed: Confirmation message shown briefly after the display language is changed. $1 = name of the newly selected language.
settings-language-reload: Notice that the application will reload to apply language change
settings-text-size-label: Label for text size selection option in settings
settings-text-size-small: Option to use small text size
settings-text-size-medium: Option to use medium text size
settings-text-size-large: Option to use large text size
settings-text-size-extra-large: Option to use extra large text size
settings-text-size-small-aria: Aria label for option to use small text size
settings-text-size-medium-aria: Aria label for option to use medium text size
settings-text-size-large-aria: Aria label for option to use large text size
settings-text-size-extra-large-aria: Aria label for option to use extra large text size
settings-close: Button text to close settings dialog
settings-apply: Button text to apply changes in settings dialog
settings-cancel: Button text to cancel changes in settings dialog
settings-translate-help: Text encouraging users to contribute translations, appears above the link
settings-translate-link: Link text to translatewiki where users can help translate the application
queries-general: Group label for general/basic query types in the query dropdown
queries-senses: Group label for Sense-related queries in the query dropdown
queries-forms: Group label for Forms-related queries in the query dropdown
queries-misplacements: Group label for data quality/misplacement queries in the query dropdown
queries-is-empty: Combobox option for finding Lexemes with no data at all (no Forms, no Senses, no Statements).
queries-missing-senses: Combobox option for finding Lexemes that have no Senses defined.
queries-missing-forms: Combobox option for finding Lexemes that have no Forms defined.
queries-missing-external-identifiers: Combobox option for finding Lexemes with no external identifier properties.
queries-missing-usage-example: Combobox option for finding Lexemes missing usage example property (P5831)
queries-missing-item-for-sense: Combobox option for finding Lexemes missing item for this sense (P5137), demonym of (P6271), or hyperonym (P6593) properties
queries-missing-predicate-troponym: Combobox option for finding Lexemes missing predicate for (P9970) or troponym of (P5975) properties
queries-missing-ipa: Combobox option for finding Lexemes missing IPA transcription property (P898)
queries-missing-pronunciation-audio: Combobox option for finding Lexemes missing pronunciation audio property (P443)
queries-missing-grammatical-features: Combobox option for finding Lexemes missing grammatical features
queries-misplaced-item-for-sense: Combobox option for finding Lexemes with item for this sense (P5137) incorrectly placed at Lexeme level instead of Sense level
filters-heading: Section heading for the filter controls area
filters-clear-all: Button text to reset all active filters to their default state
filters-text-placeholder: Placeholder text shown in text input for filtering by LID or Lemma
filters-text-label-aria: Aria label for the text input filter field
filters-category-all: Dropdown option to show all lexical categories (removes category filter)
filters-category-label: Label for lexical category filter dropdown
filters-lexical-category-placeholder: Placeholder text shown in category dropdown before selection
filters-text-clear-aria: Aria label for the clear button inside the LID/Lemma text filter input
